title: Windows Pack
description: My project is a pack that uses a 16-color palette from Windows
body:
# Windows Pack
My Minecraft texture pack is designed around the unique constraint of using a 16-color Windows palette. While the result may not always be the most visually refined, the challenge of working within this limited palette allows for a distinct, retro aesthetic. Each texture in the game from blocks to items has been meticulously created using only these 16 colors:

### Palette 16x Windows :
- #000000 (Black)
- #7e7e7e (Dark Gray)
- #bebebe (Light Gray)
- #ffffff (White)
- #7e0000 (Dark Red)
- #fe0000 (Bright Red)
- #047e00 (Dark Green)
- #06ff04 (Bright Green)
- #7e7e00 (Dark Yellow)
- #ffff04 (Bright Yellow)
- #00007e (Dark Blue)
- #0000ff (Bright Blue)
- #7e007e (Dark Magenta)
- #fe00ff (Bright Magenta)
- #047e7e (Dark Cyan)
- #06ffff (Bright Cyan)

This limitation creates a pixel-art style that feels nostalgic and challenging, appealing to those who appreciate creative boundaries in game design.
